title: Revenue Analyst
description: UPS is seeking a Revenue Analyst to analyze pricing and revenue performance across shipping and logistics services. You'll develop pricing models, track revenue metrics, and support optimization initiatives. Work hybrid in Indianapolis for the global logistics leader.
responsibilities: Analyze revenue and pricing data across service lines
Develop pricing models and margin analyses
Track key revenue metrics and KPIs
Prepare reports and presentations for management

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or Economics

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
